race.comment: MAGIC FLYER (1) finished 4 lengths away in seventh last time out over 1400m at Tamworth three weeks ago. Steps up in distance today. Settles back early but winds up late. Best form puts him right in this. BLAZED PRINCE (4) drifted well back last start then wound up strongly to finish fifth, beaten 3 lengths, over 1400m at Tamworth. Sure to prove tough to stop. CAPTAIN INSANO (5) improved sharply on his ninth two starts back at Gold Coast with a win as public elect over 1600m at Wean a week ago, getting home by 3.5 lengths. Steps up a level but he is capable of another big run. PLAYFUL PUZZLE (7) settled well back and never threatened when seventh over 1400m at Goondiwindi last time out. Likely improver with top-three prospects.
